detaileddescription.para: Mailbox of the adxl37x task

briefdescription.para: One shot timer to control suspend timeout and resume measurement.
Pointer to the sensor device driver structure.
Structure containing status information and number of FIFO entries.
The measured raw data.
Indicates which buffer is currently in use.
The current data buffer of the driver.
The sample counter.
state of internal/external sync mode
Maximal suspend time (5 minutes)
Flag indicating if hardware init was successful or not.
Flag indicating that self test has been passed or not.
Adxl data store task constructor.

detaileddescription.para:
name
The name of the class
The constructor allocate and register the tasks mailbox and initializes the sensor device driver by calling member function initDevice.

briefdescription.para: Adxl37x task destructor.

detaileddescription.para: The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.

briefdescription.para: Adxl37x task function.

detaileddescription.para:
The task function directly enter the endless loop and wait for messages. Task wakes up when a message is in the mailbox and read the message by calling mailbox read method which returns the pointer pElem to the message. All expected messages will be handled, in case of an unexpected message an error debug message will be triggered. Finally the message will be released by calling class PoolElem method free, if the pointer pElem is not explicitly set to 0.
Message Handling:
eAdxl37xFifo: Indication, that sensor raw data in FIFO available. The data will be send to Adxl data store task by calling function report. Afterwards pElem is set to 0 to avoid free() of statically allocated message.
eAdxl37xIdle: Operation mode of ADXL372 sensor will be set to Standby by calling function suspend. FIFO is cleared by calling setFifoBypass and activated for further receiption by calling setFifoOn. Finally Adxl data store task will be informed about idle state.
eAdxlStorageDone: Previous used buffer will be marked as clean
eAdxlStorageFull: Operation mode of ADXL372 sensor will be set to Standby by calling function suspend to supress measurements.
eAdxlResumeMeas: Operation mode of ADXL372 sensor will be set to WakeUp by calling function resume to enable further measurements.
eFwUpdateActive: Indication that an OTA firmaware update is started. Operation mode of ADXL372 sensor will be set to Standby by calling function suspend to supress measurements during SW update.
eRawDataTransferActive: Indication that transfer of raw data is running. Only informational, triggers a debug message.
eRawDataTransferComplete: Indication that transfer of raw data is finished. Only informational, triggers a debug message.
eDispDataTransferActive: Indication that transfer of displacement data is running. Only informational, triggers a debug message.
eDispDataTransferComplete: Indication that transfer of displacement data is finished. Only informational, triggers a debug message.
eAdxlStorageDumpActive: Indication that console data dump is running. Operation mode of ADXL372 sensor will be set to Standby by calling function suspend to supress measurements during data dump.
eAdxlStorageDumpComplete: Operation mode of ADXL372 sensor will be set to WakeUp by calling function resume to enable further measurements.
eHwReport: Report the HW status to the mailbox of HW metrics task

briefdescription.para: Timer expired function for one shot suspend timeout timer.

detaileddescription.para: The function initializes the static pool element e1 with message type eTimerExpired, set Adxl37x task as sender and put message into own (Adxl37x's) mailbox.

briefdescription.para: Adxl37x virtual task configure function.

detaileddescription.para: The configure function overloads the configure function of the task base class. It retrieves the configuration related to sensors by call of the function getCfgSensor for the acceleration sensor ADXL372 provided by the Config class, convert the activation and deactivation thresholds to 32-bit

intervall in seconds and reconfigure the metrics wakeup interval with this value. integer values and set the thresholds by call of the function sensor_attr_set provided by Zephyr driver API for x, y and z direction.

briefdescription.para: Timer callback function for unused cyclic timer.

detaileddescription.para:
timer
Pointer to timer of type k_timer
The function retrieve the user-specific data from the timer by calling kernel function k_timer_user_data_get and call Adxl37x timer expired function timer1_expired.

briefdescription.para: The FIFO handler callback function.

detaileddescription.para:
dev
pointer to the sensor device driver structure
trigger
unused parameter
On on first FIFO full interrupt synchronization clock is switched to externel clock by calling function setExtSync. Driver buffer will be switched to next free buffer and the acceleration data is retrieved by calling driver function adxl372_get_fifo_xyz_data and stored in array samples. Sample count will be adjusted by dividing through 3 (x, y, z) and own task will be informed about message receiption by message eAdxl37xFifo.

briefdescription.para: Function to set operation mode of the sensor device driver.

detaileddescription.para: Function set operation mode by calling driver function adxl372_set_op_mode. On failure error debug message are printed. See ADXL372 datasheet, page 15.

briefdescription.para: Function to set synchronization mode of the sensor device driver.

detaileddescription.para:
state
true: synchronization with external clock, false: internal clock
Function set the synchronization mode according to parameter state. If mode is still active the function returns immediatly, otherwise external clock is started or stopped according to parameter state by calling function setExtSyncClk, sensor synchronization will be configured according to parameter state by calling function adxl372_set_ext_sync. On failure error debug message are printed. Finally flag extSync will be set to parameter state. See ADXL372 datasheet, page 27.

briefdescription.para: Function to start or stop external synchronization clock.

detaileddescription.para:
state
true: start external synchronization clock, false: stop clock
External clock is started or stopped according to parameter state by calling function Pwm::inst()->start() or Pwm::inst()->stop().

briefdescription.para: Function to clears the FIFO data of the sensor device driver.

detaileddescription.para: Function clear the FIFO data by calling driver function adxl372_configure_fifo. On failure error debug message are printed. FIFO will be disabled by setting mode to ADXL372_FIFO_BYPASSED, which clears any data in FIFO. See ADXL372 datasheet, page 23.

briefdescription.para: Function to activate FIFO of the sensor device driver.

detaileddescription.para: Function activate FIFO by calling driver function adxl372_configure_fifo. On failure error debug message are printed. FIFO will be configued to stream mode (last N), 170 sample sets of concurrent 3-axis data with 128 x, y and z values (3 * 128 = 384). See ADXL372 datasheet, page 23.

briefdescription.para: Function to suspend the sensor measurement.

detaileddescription.para: To suspend the sensor measurement the ADXL372 sensor will be set to Standby by calling function setOpMode with parameter ADXL372_STANDBY. By calling function setExtSync synchronization is switched back to internal.

briefdescription.para: Function to resume the sensor measurement.

detaileddescription.para: FIFO is cleared by calling setFifoBypass and activated for further receiption by calling setFifoOn. All FIFO buffers will be marked as clean by setting dirty flags to false. Finally the operation mode of ADXL372 sensor will be set to WakeUp by calling function setOpMode with parameter ADXL372_WAKE_UP.

briefdescription.para: Conversion of received sensor value.

detaileddescription.para: Function converts received sensor value and store it in quasi floating point structure with integer and fractional part.

briefdescription.para: Function to dump received sensor values.

detaileddescription.para:
s
measured sensor values in structure of type adxl372_xyz_accel_data
Dump the first 10 entries of the measured data. x, y and z data will be converted to floating point values of type struct sensor_value and afterward converted to float by calling function sensor_value_to_double before print out.

briefdescription.para: Getter function to retrieve status information and number of FIFO entries.

detaileddescription.para: Function status information and number of FIFO entries by calling driver function adxl372_get_status. On failure error debug message are printed. See ADXL372 datasheet, page 34f.

briefdescription.para: Function to initialize the sensor device driver.

detaileddescription.para:
Function initializes the SPI bus by calling function spibus::inst()->init() and retrieves a pointer to the sensor device object by calling macro DEVICE_DT_GET_ANY and casting to pointer of type struct device. With call of function device_is_ready it checks if the sensor device is ready to use. Result is stored in private class variable device_good. If device is not ready an error message will be printed. Furthermore the operating mode of the device is set to STANDBY mode, trigger type and channel are assigned and set. Afterward external syncronization signal will be initialized with 4400 Hz and 80 usec pulse width by calling Pwm::inst()->init(), Pwm::inst()->setPeriod() and Pwm::inst()->setPulseWidth(). Afterwards FIFO will be cleared and activated and operation mode is set to FULL_BW_MEASUREMENT and STANDBY. This sequence triggers the initial calibration of the sensor to the current prevalent acceleration ratio in idle mode of the sensor. Finally FIFO will be cleared and activated and operation mode is set to WAKE_UP. See ADXL372 datasheet, page 19ff for interrupt configuration, page 25 for interrupt configuration and page 29 for SPI support.
SPI clock frequency has to be adjusted in file nrf9160dk_switch_common.dts with entry spi-max-frequency = <8000000>; The value must be unsigned integer in Hz.
In Zephyr devicetree ADXL SPI is SPI bus 2.

briefdescription.para: Function to send received data to Adxl data store task.

detaileddescription.para: The function request a pointer to the mailbox of Adxl data store task and a message from message pool, set message type to eAdxl37xSensorData, set Adxl37x task as sender, copy timestamp, sample count and acceleration data into payload of the message and send to Adxl data store mailbox. Finally the currently used buffer will be marked in array dirty.

briefdescription.para: Function to send a HW status message to HW metrics task.

detaileddescription.para: The function retrieve the HW status by calling function getStatus, request a pointer to the mailbox of HW metrics task and a message from message pool, set message type to eHwStatusAdxl37x, set Adxl37x task as sender, copy the boolean status value into payload of the message and send it to HW metrics mailbox.

briefdescription.para: Print function.

detaileddescription.para: Not implemented, for future use

briefdescription.para: Adxl37x acceleration sensor class derived from task base class.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: The Adxl37x class handle the reception of the acceleration data, delegate storage and further processing to Adxl data store task. It provides methods to receive the data from driver FIFO, to initialize the Adxl372 driver, to set the operating mode of the driver, to switch synchronization mode between internal and external, enable and clear driver FIFO, to convert and dump the received data and to inform Adxl data store task about new data.

To avoid instabilities of the system when OTA Message Interaction:
Receive
Adxl data store task
RMS task
Firmware update control task
HTTP connector task
Adxl37x task (self, from callback function fifo_handler)
Transmit
Adxl data store task
HTTP connector task
Adxl37x task (self, transmission in callback function fifo_handler)
